overview: Demon Centaur is a SubBoss-class Demon/Beast monster found in Inferno. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 800 HP, 28 physical damage, 200 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 5, MaxImpactEndurance 6. 6 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Sprint Attack at 220% ratio (616 base damage). Sight range 1000, combat radius 200.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 5 melee attacks. Attack1 (150%), Attack2 (180%), Attack2 From Idle (180%), and more.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Ice, Light, Divine
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Ice (-3000), Light (-2000), Divine (-2000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Resists: Dark, Evil
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Dark (+500), Evil (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 200
strategies.description: Has 200 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Highest Damage: Sprint Attack (220% ratio)
strategies.description: Sprint Attack deals 616 damage at base (220% ratio). This is the most dangerous attack to avoid.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 1000 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 1000 units, loses target at 1800 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 200, ability check distance 250
strategies.description: Combat area radius 200. Ability check distance 250. Ability attack delay: 0.2s.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 150 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.stuck_description: Has stuck-detection failsafes in behavior tree.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 1000 units. Loses target at 1800 units.
